channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Big branch of oak tree fallen, 17th June
item.description:
A big branch of the oak tree in Symphony Road has fallen down. Need removing and tree checking for safety reasons, lots it walkers and children play under here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cold Pool Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes on River Leys, 17th June
item.description:
The road surface on River Leys is getting extremely bare especially outside no 128 and no 130, near the kerbsides. The middle of the road on the whole estate is getting very visible potholes. The estate was built in the early 1980s and I'm not aware that the road has had any attention since it was legally adopted by the authorities. As more cars and delivery vehicles are being used the surface of the road is getting dangerous, especially for pedestrians who have to traverse onto the road around vehicles that are parked on the pavements. I'm concerned that this problem is another accident waiting to happen (ie someone falling and badly injuring themselves)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 168-171, River Leys, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public footpath not passable, 17th June
item.description:
Public footpath is getting non passable due to hedges and thorn bushes in the way
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Priory Lane, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal Well Bus Station, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duglynch Lane, Gretton, Tewkesbury

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 17th June
item.description:
Storm gully cover is loose and is making loud thudding noise as vehicles go over it.
Report on FixMyStreet
